response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple domains, including C++ (as seen in his role at National Instruments), but his recent work heavily emphasizes Node.js, TypeScript, and other high-level languages. His expertise in C++ is outdated (last full-time C++ role was in 2015), and his current focus on cloud-native and web technologies does not align closely with the role's requirement for deep C++ and industrial automation expertise. His lack of recent secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 experience further reduces his fit.
strengths: Strong C++ background from earlier roles, including work at National Instruments
Demonstrated ability to architect and deliver scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, Direct Mail automation platform)
Experience with secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, code quality initiatives)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last full-time C++ role was in 2015)
No evidence of experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or SDL practices
Current expertise skewed toward web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript) rather than C++/STL or industrial automation
